components.name: Index (route shell)
components.props: none (TanStack file route component; Route = createFileRoute("/")({ head, component: Index }))
features: Head meta: title 'Eventiq — AI Event Planning', description, og:title, og:description
Full-viewport layout: h-screen flex, Sidebar left + main content + optional VendorDetailPanel right + FloatingAgentChat overlay
Mobile hamburger button (Menu icon, md:hidden, absolute top-3 left-3 z-20, rounded-xl border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur) opens Sidebar drawer

Theme toggle button absolute top-3 right-3 (sm:top-4 sm:right-4) z-20 showing Sun when dark / Moon when light; toggles `dark` class on documentElement and persists to localStorage key 'eventiq-theme'; bootstraps from localStorage or prefers-color-scheme on mount
Tab switching: 'events' | 'calendar' | 'billing'; switching tabs clears activeId (unless events), openVendorId, creating, eventChatOpen
Creating flow: 'New Event' renders NewEventChat full-screen replacing all tabs; onCreate prepends new event, exits creating, opens that event

Event detail view: 'Back to all events' button (ArrowLeft icon, text-xs) clears activeId and closes chat; segmented toggle (inline-flex rounded-lg border p-0.5 bg-muted/40) with 'Dashboard'/'Agent chat' pills — active pill gets bg-background shadow-sm
Dashboard mode renders OverviewTab; Agent chat mode renders EventAgentChat
No active event on 'events' tab → MyEventsPage grid
VendorDetailPanel renders (with key={openVendor.id} to remount per vendor) only when a vendor is open AND not creating
FloatingAgentChat always mounted at root, receives all events + activeEventId
dataFields: EventModel.id (activeId lookup, list keys)
EventModel.vendors (openVendor lookup by vendor.id)
VendorContact.id

Mutations: handleCreateFromChat(evt: EventModel) prepends to events array; handleVendorUpdate(patch: Partial<VendorContact>) spread-merges patch onto the open vendor inside the active event; handleEventUpdate(patch: Partial<EventModel>) spread-merges patch onto the active event. All three are setEvents map/spread operations on local useState — these become API calls (create event, patch vendor, patch event).
components.notes: State: events (seeded from mockEvents), activeId, tab, openVendorId, creating, dark, eventChatOpen, sidebarOpen. activeEvent/openVendor are useMemo derivations. Theme persistence in try/catch. Content area is flex-1 overflow-y-auto; main is flex min-w-0 overflow-hidden.

components.name: Sidebar
components.props: interface SidebarProps { active: Tab; onChange: (t: Tab) => void; onNew: () => void; mobileOpen?: boolean; onMobileClose?: () => void } — Tab type imported from ./TabBar
features: Logo image at top (logoAsset.url from eventiq-logo.svg.asset.json, h-8 w-auto, alt 'Eventiq')
Mobile close button (X icon, md:hidden) in header row
Mobile overlay backdrop (md:hidden fixed inset-0 z-30 bg-foreground/40 backdrop-blur-sm) shown when mobileOpen; clicking it calls onMobileClose

Off-canvas drawer on mobile: fixed z-40 w-[260px], slides via translate-x (-translate-x-full when closed, transition-transform duration-200); static md:w-[240px] on desktop, bg-card on mobile vs md:bg-card/40 on desktop

3 nav items: My Events (LayoutGrid), Calendar (CalendarDays), Billing (CreditCard); active item styled bg-primary-soft text-primary glow-primary; inactive hover:bg-muted/60; all items hover:translate-x-0.5 micro-shift; clicking calls onChange(id) then onMobileClose?.()
'New Event' primary button (Plus icon, rounded-xl bg-primary, hover:opacity-90 active:scale-[0.98]) calls onNew then onMobileClose?.()
Footer user card: gradient avatar (from-primary to-info) with initials 'JD', hardcoded name 'Jamie Doe' + email 'jamie@eventiq.app', non-functional Sign out button (LogOut icon)
dataFields: none from data model — purely navigational; consumes Tab union only
components.notes: Uses custom utilities glow-primary and bg-primary-soft. Hardcoded fake user. Nav defined as local const array.

components.name: TabBar (ORPHAN component; Tab type is load-bearing)
components.props: export type Tab = "calendar" | "events" | "billing"; interface TabBarProps { title: string; subtitle?: string; rightTitle?: string; dark: boolean; onToggleDark: () => void; onMenu?: () => void }
features: Sticky translucent header (sticky top-0 z-10 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur border-b)
Optional mobile menu button (Menu icon, md:hidden) when onMenu provided
Title (text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold truncate) + optional subtitle line
Optional rightTitle: hidden sm:inline bold muted text on desktop; on mobile rendered as separate row below (sm:hidden)
Theme toggle button (Sun/Moon depending on dark prop)
dataFields: none — presentational only
components.notes: The TabBar component itself is never rendered anywhere (routes/index.tsx implements its own back-bar + theme toggle inline). However both routes/index.tsx and Sidebar.tsx import `type Tab` from this file, so the type export must be preserved in the port.

components.name: MyEventsPage
components.props: interface Props { events: EventModel[]; onSelect: (id: string) => void; onNew: () => void }
features: Header 'My events' with live count line: '{filtered.length} of {events.length} event(s)' (singular/plural handled)
'New event' primary button (Plus icon; label text hidden on mobile via hidden sm:inline)

Filter bar (rounded-xl border bg-card/40, stacks flex-col on mobile / md:flex-row): Filter icon label, Type multi-select Popover (shadcn Popover), date-range From/To native date inputs, and a clear-all X button shown only when any filter active

Type popover: checkbox-style buttons for all 6 EventTypes from eventTypeMeta, custom check square (bg-primary when checked, ✓ glyph at text-[10px]), max-h-72 scroll, 'Clear selection' footer link when any selected; trigger button shows 'All types' / single label / 'N types' summary + ChevronDown

Filtering logic: type must be in selected set (events with no type are excluded when filtering), date must be within [from,to] using date-fns isWithinInterval with ±8640000000000000 sentinels; results sorted ascending by event date
Responsive card grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4

Event card (entire card is a button → onSelect(evt.id)): h-28 cover area showing coverImage (group-hover:scale-[1.02] zoom) or gradient placeholder (from-primary/10 to-muted) with Camera icon + 'Add a picture' text; hover:border-primary/40 hover:shadow-sm on card; name turns text-primary on hover
Card meta row: Pin icon (h-3 w-3 text-primary fill-primary) when evt.pinned; status dot (1.5px round, color from eventStatusMeta.dot) + label; EventType chip (text-[10px] bg-muted) when type present
Date formatted 'EEE, MMM d, yyyy'
3-stat strip per card (Stat sub-component, rounded-lg bg-muted/50): Guests 'confirmed/count' or em-dash, Budget '£{spent/1000 toFixed(1)}k' or em-dash, Vendors count
Empty states: zero events → 'No events yet. Click New event to start.'; filters exclude everything → 'No events match your filters.' (col-span-full centered)
dataFields: EventModel.id, name, date, type, status, pinned, coverImage, attendees.count, attendees.confirmed, budget.spent, vendors.length
No mutations — read-only; callbacks onSelect/onNew bubble up
components.notes: Local Stat helper component { icon?: ReactNode; label: string; value: string }. Uses date-fns format/parseISO/isWithinInterval. Currency hardcoded to £.

components.name: OverviewTab
components.props: interface Props { event: EventModel; onOpenVendor: (id: string) => void; onUpdateEvent?: (patch: Partial<EventModel>) => void }
features: Whole-tab empty state when no venue/catering/attendees/budget AND zero vendors: centered 🎯 emoji, 'No confirmed details yet', 'Chat with the agent to start making decisions for this event.'

Cover image header (rounded-2xl h-40 sm:h-56): shows event.coverImage object-cover, else placeholder with Camera icon + 'Add a picture of your event'; hidden file input (accept image/*) + overlay button top-right (ImagePlus icon, bg-background/90 backdrop-blur) labeled 'Change photo' / 'Upload photo' — on file select runs FileReader.readAsDataURL and calls onUpdateEvent({ coverImage: dataURL }), then resets input value
DeliveryTracker stepper mounted directly under cover (receives full event)

3 KeyCards (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3): Guests 'confirmed / count' with '{count-confirmed} pending' sub; Budget '£spent.toLocaleString()' with 'of £total' sub; Catering name with 'Confirmed'/'Pending' sub; each KeyCard is card-soft with absolute 1px-high bg-primary/80 top accent bar and h-10 w-10 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 icon tile

Checklist card (card-soft, only when milestones exist): ListChecks header; per milestone an icon — CheckCircle2 text-primary (done), AlertTriangle text-destructive (overdue), Circle muted (pending); done titles get line-through + muted; date 'MMM d' on right; rows hover:bg-muted/40 (display only, not clickable)
Location + Schedule side-by-side grid (lg:grid-cols-2, only if venue or schedule exists)

Location card: MapPin header, venue.name right-aligned, address line, embedded Google Maps iframe (https://www.google.com/maps?q={encodeURIComponent(address)}&output=embed, h-80 lg:h-[28rem], loading=lazy, referrerPolicy no-referrer-when-downgrade)

Schedule card: Clock header + event date 'EEEE, MMM d'; rows in grid-cols-[64px_1fr] with mono time + title in rounded-lg border-l-4 border-primary bg-primary/5 pill; list divide-y, lg:max-h-[28rem] lg:overflow-y-auto

Vendor contacts table (card-soft, only when vendors exist): header with vendor count; columns Vendor/Category/Contact/Phone/Email/Status; Phone column hidden below sm, Email hidden below md; row click → onOpenVendor(v.id) (cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/40); tel: and mailto: links stopPropagation so they don't open the panel; status rendered as rounded-full pill using vendorStatusMeta tone + toneClasses; table wrapped in overflow-x-auto
dataFields: EventModel.name, date, coverImage, venue.name, venue.address, catering.name, catering.confirmed, attendees.count, attendees.confirmed, budget.spent, budget.total, schedule[].time, schedule[].title, milestones[].id/status/title/date, vendors[].id/vendorName/category/contactName/phone/email/status
Mutates: coverImage via onUpdateEvent({ coverImage }) — only field written from this component
components.notes: Uses card-soft utility extensively. KeyCard local helper { icon, label, value, sub? }. Cover stored as base64 data URL in mock mode — real port should upload. DeliveryTracker also reads venue.confirmed/budget.committed via the event prop.

components.name: CalendarPage
components.props: interface Props { events: EventModel[]; onSelectEvent: (id: string) => void }
features: Month header 'MMMM yyyy' + subtitle 'Milestones and event dates across all your events' (subtitle hidden on mobile)
Prev/Next month chevron buttons + 'Today' button (resets cursor to startOfMonth(now))
Weekday header row Mon–Sun (weekStartsOn: 1); single letters on mobile (sm:hidden), full 3-letter on desktop

Full month grid: grid-cols-7, days computed from startOfWeek(startOfMonth) to endOfWeek(endOfMonth) by +86400000ms steps; out-of-month cells de-emphasized (bg-transparent border-transparent text-muted-foreground/60); in-month cells bg-background border-border/60
Today's day number highlighted in filled circle (bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-full)
Day cells min-h-[64px] mobile / sm:min-h-[112px]; itemsByDay map keyed 'yyyy-MM-dd' aggregating each event's date (kind 'event') plus all its milestones (kind 'milestone')
Event chips: bg-primary-soft text-primary rounded-md with ★ prefix; on mobile only ★ shows (label hidden sm:inline); click → onSelectEvent(eventId); hover:bg-primary/15

Milestone chips: colored category dot (categoryDot map: finance=bg-warning, logistics=bg-info, catering=bg-success, venue=bg-primary, communication=bg-pending, other=bg-muted-foreground) + truncated title (title text hidden on mobile, native title= tooltip); click → onSelectEvent of owning event
Max 3 items per day then '+N' overflow counter
dataFields: EventModel.id, name, date, milestones[].date/category/title (milestone id unused, index keys)
No mutations — read-only
components.notes: Ends with `void isSameDay;` to silence unused date-fns import. Uses bg-primary-soft and the bg-pending custom token. Cursor state is local startOfMonth Date.

components.name: BillingPage
features: Static mock billing screen, max-w-3xl mx-auto
Current Plan card: Wallet icon tile, 'Pro — billed monthly', '$29 / month', non-functional 'Change plan' link-button

Payment Method card: CreditCard icon tile, 'Visa ending in 4242', green 'Active' pill (hardcoded emerald-100/emerald-700 + dark:emerald-900/30 dark:emerald-400 — NOT the semantic success token), non-functional 'Update card' link-button
Recent Invoices card: Receipt icon tile, 3 hardcoded rows (Jun/May/Apr 1 2026, $29.00, 'Paid' muted pill), divider borders
dataFields: none — entirely hardcoded local literals
components.notes: Only place using raw Tailwind emerald palette instead of design tokens. All buttons are inert.

components.name: ProvidersPage (ORPHAN — never imported/mounted)
components.props: interface Props { events: EventModel[]; onOpenEvent: (id: string) => void }
features: Flattens all vendors across all events into Row { vendorId, eventId, eventName, vendor }
Search input (Search icon inset-left, bg-muted/60 rounded-xl) matching vendorName, contactName, email, or eventName (case-insensitive)

Category multi-select Popover (same checkbox pattern as MyEventsPage but with category icons per row; align='end'; 'Clear selection' footer; summary text 'All categories' / label / 'N categories') plus separate X clear button when active
List table in rounded-2xl border card: desktop 12-col grid header (Provider 4 / Contact 3 / Event 3 / Status 2, hidden below md); rows stack to single column on mobile
Provider cell: category icon tile (bg-primary-soft text-primary), vendor name + category label; on mobile status pill moves inline to this row (md:hidden ml-auto)
Contact cell: contact name, mailto link with Mail icon, tel link with Phone icon, optional website link 'site' with Globe icon (target=_blank rel=noreferrer)
Event cell: event name as text-primary hover:underline button → onOpenEvent(eventId)
Status cell (desktop): tone pill via toneClasses[vendorStatusMeta[status].tone]
Row hover:bg-muted/30; empty state 'No providers match your filters.'
dataFields: EventModel.id, name, vendors; VendorContact.id, vendorName, contactName, email, phone, website, category, status
No mutations
components.notes: ORPHANED: grep confirms no file imports ProvidersPage. Its onOpenEvent prop matches the shell's openEvent(id) signature — likely a dropped 4th tab. Port decision needed: include or drop.

components.name: NewEventChat
components.props: interface Props { onCancel: () => void; onCreate: (evt: EventModel) => void }
features: Full-height column chat UI: header (Sparkles icon in bg-primary-soft tile, 'New event with Eventiq' + subtitle), X cancel button → onCancel
Scripted 5-step wizard (SCRIPT array): asks name → type → date (YYYY-MM-DD) → guest count → final 'Tap Create event' message; each user answer parsed into draft state
Type parsing: lowercase substring match against eventTypeMeta keys, fallback 'other'; guests parsed via parseInt of digits-only; date kept as raw string
Message rendering: agent messages plain text left-aligned (max-w-[80%]); user messages right-aligned bubbles (rounded-2xl bg-primary text-primary-foreground)
Auto-scroll to bottom + autofocus input on each new message
Textarea composer (rows=1, max-h-32, Enter sends / Shift+Enter newline), Send icon button disabled when input empty (disabled:opacity-40)
When script complete (ready), composer is replaced by a footer summary 'Draft: {name} · {type label} · {date} · {guests} guests' + 'Create event' button

create() builds EventModel: id `evt-${Date.now()}`, name || 'Untitled event', status 'draft', type ?? 'other', date = parsed draft date toISOString (fallback now+30 days), updatedAt now, attendees { count: guests, confirmed: 0 } only if guests given, vendors: [], milestones: []; calls onCreate(evt) — this is the mock 'create event' API
dataFields: Constructs/mutates: EventModel.id, name, status, type, date, updatedAt, attendees, vendors, milestones (via onCreate)
Reads eventTypeMeta for type parsing and draft summary label
components.notes: No persistence — chat resets if cancelled. Local Msg type { id, role: 'user'|'agent', text }. send() guards step >= SCRIPT.length-1.

components.name: EventAgentChat
components.props: interface Props { event: EventModel; onClose: () => void }
features: Per-event chat persisted in localStorage under key `eventiq:chat:${eventId}` (load with corrupt-JSON guard; save on every message change in try/catch)
Seed greeting when no stored thread: 'Hi! I'm here to help you organize {event.name}. What would you like to discuss?'
Reloads thread when event.id/event.name changes (switching events)
Header: MessageSquare icon in bg-primary-soft tile, 'Event Agent' title, 'Organizing {event.name}' subtitle, X close button → onClose
Same bubble styling as NewEventChat (agent plain left, user bg-primary bubble right, max-w-[80%])
Auto-scroll + autofocus on message change
Composer: textarea Enter-to-send/Shift+Enter newline, Send button disabled when empty
Canned agent reply for every send: 'Thanks for your message! I'll review the details for your event and get back to you shortly.' — replace with real agent backend
dataFields: EventModel.id (storage key), EventModel.name (greeting/subtitle)
No EventModel mutations; mutates only localStorage chat threads
components.notes: Shares the localStorage key namespace `eventiq:chat:${id}` with FloatingAgentChat, so both views see the same per-event thread.

components.name: FloatingAgentChat
components.props: interface Props { events: EventModel[]; activeEventId?: string | null }
features: Closed state: fixed bottom-5 right-5 z-40 h-14 w-14 round FAB (bg-primary, Sparkles icon, shadow-lg, hover:scale-105 transition-transform)
Open state: fixed bottom-right panel w-[min(92vw,380px)] h-[min(80vh,560px)] rounded-2xl border bg-card shadow-2xl
Header: MessageSquare tile, 'Event Agent', subtitle 'Linked to {name}' or 'General chat', X close button
Linked-event banner (when linked): bg-muted/30 strip with Link2 icon + 'Conversation linked to "{name}"' + 'Unlink' button (setLinkedId(null) → switches to global thread)
Thread storage: global key 'eventiq:chat:global' or per-event `eventiq:chat:${id}` (shared with EventAgentChat); load/persist with try/catch; reload when currentKey changes
Auto-link: useEffect sets linkedId whenever activeEventId becomes truthy (navigating into an event links the FAB chat)

Event-mention detection on send: detectEvent lowercases input, sorts events by name length desc (longest match wins), skips names <3 chars, substring match → if a different event matched, switches linkedId, loads that event's stored thread, appends user msg + agent msg 'Got it — linking this conversation to "{name}". How can I help?', and writes the merged thread straight to localStorage
Normal send: canned reply — linked: 'Thanks! I'll look into that for {name} and get back to you shortly.'; unlinked: 'Thanks! Tell me which event this relates to, or ask me anything to get started.'

Greetings: linked 'Hi! I'm here to help you organize {name}. What would you like to discuss?'; global 'Hi! I'm your event assistant. Ask me anything, or mention an event by name to focus our conversation on it.'
Bubbles max-w-[85%]; composer placeholder 'Mention an event by name to link it…'; Enter sends; Send disabled when empty; auto-scroll/focus only while open
dataFields: EventModel.id, name (detection, linking, greetings, storage keys)
No EventModel mutations; writes localStorage chat threads (including direct setItem during link-switch)
components.notes: Always mounted by the shell, overlays everything (z-40, same z as mobile sidebar drawer — FAB sits under open VendorDetailPanel on mobile since panel is z-50). currentKey/greeting recomputed per render; eslint-disable on reload effect deps.

components.name: VendorStrip (ORPHAN — never imported/mounted)
components.props: interface Props { vendors: VendorContact[]; onOpen: (id: string) => void }
features: card-soft container with animate-card-in entrance animation and inline style animationDelay 350ms
Header: Users icon + 'Vendor contacts' uppercase label, '{n} vendors' count on right
Empty state: 'No vendors yet — ask the agent to add one.'
Horizontal scroll strip (flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto snap-x) of fixed-width w-[260px] snap-start vendor cards; card click → onOpen(v.id)
Each card: category icon tile (bg-primary/10 text-primary) + category label, status tone pill (toneClasses), vendor name + contact name truncated
Quick-action icon buttons: tel: Phone, mailto: Mail, optional website Globe (target=_blank) — all stopPropagation; hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary
Pencil edit affordance on far right, opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 (reveal on card hover)
Card hover: hover:bg-muted/40 hover:border-primary/40
dataFields: VendorContact.id, category, vendorName, contactName, phone, email, website, status
No mutations
components.notes: ORPHANED: grep confirms nothing imports VendorStrip — OverviewTab replaced it with an inline table. Only component using animate-card-in with a stagger delay.

components.name: VendorDetailPanel
components.props: interface Props { vendor: VendorContact; onClose: () => void; onUpdate: (patch: Partial<VendorContact>) => void }
features: Right-side panel: md:static md:w-[360px] border-l on desktop; full-screen overlay on mobile (fixed z-50 inset-0 w-full); enters with animate-slide-in-right (0.2s)
Header: category icon tile, category label, vendor name, X close button → onClose

Contact section: contact name, tel/mailto/website links (each hover:text-primary), plus a row of 2-3 equal-width outline action buttons 'Call' (Phone), 'Email' (Mail), conditional 'Site' (Globe, target=_blank)

Status section: native <select> of all 6 VendorStatus options (order: quote_requested, awaiting_confirmation, deposit_paid, booked, delivered, cancelled) labeled via vendorStatusMeta; onChange calls onUpdate({ status: s, statusHistory: [...vendor.statusHistory, { status: s, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }] }) — i.e. status change APPENDS to history; below it a 'Current: {label}' tone pill
Notes section: textarea (rows 4) with local state seeded from vendor.notes, re-synced on vendor.id/vendor.notes change; commits ON BLUR via onUpdate({ notes }) — inline-edit pattern
Activity log: statusHistory rendered newest-first ([...].reverse()), each entry bg-primary dot + 'Status changed to <label>' + timestamp formatted "MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a"
dataFields: Reads: VendorContact.id, category, vendorName, contactName, phone, email, website, status, notes, statusHistory[].status/timestamp

Mutates via onUpdate patches: status + statusHistory (append entry with ISO timestamp), notes (blur commit). Shell merges patch into the vendor inside events state — these are the future PATCH /vendors/:id calls.
components.notes: Shell remounts it with key={openVendor.id} so internal notes state resets per vendor. format() called on raw new Date(timestamp) (not parseISO).

components.name: DeliveryTracker
components.props: ({ event }: { event: EventModel }) — single prop, no interface
features: 5-step horizontal progress stepper: Planning → Venues confirmed → Vendors booked → Payments done → Ready

Derived completion: step1 always true; venueConfirmed = !!event.venue?.confirmed; vendorsBooked = vendors.length > 0 AND every vendor status in {booked, deposit_paid, delivered}; paymentsDone = budget ? spent >= committed * 0.9 : false; ready = event.status === 'completed'
currentIdx = first incomplete step; lastDone derived for connector coloring
Done step: filled circle bg-primary with Check icon; current step: bg-card border-2 border-primary text-primary with pulse-ring animated glow; future step: bg-muted with number
Connector lines h-px between steps, bg-primary up to lastDone else bg-border
Labels under circles, font-medium foreground for done/current, muted otherwise
Container: animate-card-in entrance, overflow-x-auto with min-w-[480px] inner row so the stepper horizontally scrolls on small screens
dataFields: EventModel.venue.confirmed, vendors[].status, budget.spent, budget.committed, status
No mutations — pure derived display
components.notes: Mounted only inside OverviewTab. Uses custom utilities animate-card-in and pulse-ring.

designNotes: styles.css is Tailwind v4 syntax: `@import "tailwindcss" source(none)` + `@source "../src"` + `@import "tw-animate-css"`, `@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *))` (class-based dark mode toggled on documentElement by the shell, persisted as localStorage 'eventiq-theme'). All colors oklch. Beyond standard shadcn tokens it defines FIVE extra semantic colors registered in a second @theme inline block: --color-success (green #16A34A-ish), --color-warning (amber), --color-pending (gray), --color-info (blue), --color-primary-soft (pale orange tint; dark variant oklch(0.32 0.09 55)). Primary is ORANGE oklch(0.74 0.17 55) ≈ #FF8D01 ('Luma-inspired' palette; the comment 'Signature violet glow' is stale — it is orange). Radius base 0.625rem with extended --radius-2xl/3xl/4xl steps. Body font 'Inter' with font-feature-settings "cv11","ss01", antialiased. Four custom @utility classes used throughout: `glow-primary` (double box-shadow ring+blur via color-mix of --primary, used on active sidebar item), `card-soft` (white card, 1rem radius, subtle dual shadow — the standard dashboard card), `animate-card-in` (0.35s fade+translateY(8px) entrance), `animate-slide-in-right` (0.2s translateX(100%)→0, vendor panel), `pulse-ring` (1.8s infinite expanding box-shadow ring, current stepper step). categoryDot in CalendarPage maps milestone categories to these tokens (bg-warning/bg-info/bg-success/bg-primary/bg-pending). meta.ts toneClasses provides badge recipes: `bg-{tone}/10 text-{tone} ring-1 ring-inset ring-{tone}/20` for success/primary/warning/info/danger(destructive)/muted. Logo: src/assets/eventiq-logo.svg.asset.json is a platform asset manifest (Lovable/L5E-style) pointing url "/__l5e/assets-v1/8672f5c3-0342-4a83-85a3-580446e180ef/eventiq-logo.svg" (2261-byte SVG, r2-hosted); Sidebar imports the JSON and uses logoAsset.url — port must replace with a real static SVG import. BillingPage uniquely bypasses tokens with raw emerald-100/700 classes. Status dot colors come from eventStatusMeta.dot (bg-info/bg-success/bg-warning/bg-pending). shadcn components actually used: only Popover (PopoverTrigger/PopoverContent with asChild and align="end").
shellWiring: routes/index.tsx defines the single "/" file route with head() meta and an Index component holding ALL app state in useState: events (EventModel[], seeded from mockEvents), activeId (string|null selected event), tab (Tab = 'calendar'|'events'|'billing', type imported from TabBar.tsx), openVendorId (string|null), creating (bool, new-event chat mode), dark (theme bool), eventChatOpen (bool, dashboard vs agent-chat toggle inside an event), sidebarOpen (mobile drawer bool). Derived: activeEvent = events.find(id===activeId); openVendor = activeEvent?.vendors.find(id===openVendorId). Theme: bootstrap effect reads localStorage 'eventiq-theme' falling back to prefers-color-scheme; second effect toggles 'dark' class on <html> and persists. Layout: h-screen flex → <Sidebar active tab, onChange (switches tab; if tab !== 'events' clears activeId; always clears openVendorId/creating/eventChatOpen), onNew=handleNewEvent, mobileOpen/onMobileClose> → <main flex-1> content column with two absolute z-20 buttons (mobile Menu opens sidebar; Sun/Moon theme toggle top-right) over a flex-1 overflow-y-auto scroll area. Rendering priority: creating ? <NewEventChat onCancel={setCreating(false)} onCreate={handleCreateFromChat}> replaces everything : tab==='calendar' → <CalendarPage events onSelectEvent={openEvent}>; tab==='events' → activeEvent ? detail view (back button clearing activeId+chat, segmented Dashboard/Agent-chat pill toggle, then eventChatOpen ? <EventAgentChat event onClose> : <OverviewTab event onOpenVendor={setOpenVendorId} onUpdateEvent={handleEventUpdate}>) : <MyEventsPage events onSelect={openEvent} onNew={handleNewEvent}>; tab==='billing' → <BillingPage/> (no props). Right side: {openVendor && !creating} → <VendorDetailPanel key={openVendor.id} vendor onClose={setOpenVendorId(null)} onUpdate={handleVendorUpdate}> (key forces remount per vendor so notes textarea resets). Always-on: <FloatingAgentChat events activeEventId={activeId}> at root. Mock mutation handlers (the future API surface): handleNewEvent() resets selection and enters creating mode; handleCreateFromChat(evt) → setEvents(prev => [evt, ...prev]) i.e. POST /events then select it; handleEventUpdate(patch: Partial<EventModel>) → map events, spread patch onto activeEvent i.e. PATCH /events/:id (currently only coverImage flows through this, from OverviewTab photo upload); handleVendorUpdate(patch: Partial<VendorContact>) → map events → map vendors, spread patch onto openVendor i.e. PATCH /events/:eventId/vendors/:vendorId (status+statusHistory append, and notes blur-commit from VendorDetailPanel); openEvent(id) selects an event, forces 'events' tab, closes vendor panel and chat. Mobile: sidebar is an off-canvas fixed drawer with backdrop, hamburger lives in the shell; vendor panel goes full-screen fixed z-50; FAB chat is fixed bottom-right z-40.
